# FlowBoard Frequently Asked Questions

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is FlowBoard?

FlowBoard is a modern project management platform designed to help teams organize, track, and ship their work. Founded in 2021, FlowBoard combines the visual clarity of Kanban boards with powerful timeline views, sprint planning, and automation features. Whether you're managing a small startup project or coordinating enterprise-level initiatives, FlowBoard adapts to your workflow.

### Who is FlowBoard designed for?

FlowBoard is built for teams of all sizes across industries. Software development teams use it for sprint planning and issue tracking. Marketing teams use it to coordinate campaigns and content calendars. Product teams use it for roadmap planning and feature releases. We currently serve over 50,000 teams worldwide, from 2-person startups to Fortune 500 companies with 5,000+ users.

### Is there a free trial?

Yes! All new signups start with a 14-day free trial of FlowBoard Pro with no credit card required. You'll have full access to unlimited projects, custom fields, automations, and all Pro-tier features. After 14 days, you can choose to upgrade to Pro ($12/user/month) or continue on our Free plan (up to 5 users and 3 projects). Enterprise trials can be arranged through our sales team.

### Can I export my data from FlowBoard?

Absolutely. We believe your data is yours. You can export your entire workspace at any time from Settings > Data Export. Exports include all projects, tasks, comments, attachments, and activity history in JSON format. For Pro and Enterprise users, we also offer CSV exports of individual projects and automated weekly backups to your own cloud storage (Google Drive, Dropbox, or AWS S3).

### What is your uptime guarantee?

FlowBoard maintains 99.9% uptime, measured monthly. We host on AWS infrastructure across multiple availability zones for redundancy. Our status page at status.flowboard.io shows real-time system health and historical uptime data. Enterprise customers receive 99.95% uptime SLA with financial credits if we fall short. We perform maintenance during low-traffic windows (typically Saturday 2-4 AM EST) with 48 hours advance notice.

### Which browsers does FlowBoard support?

FlowBoard works in all modern browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge (all within the last 2 versions). We recommend Chrome or Firefox for the best experience. Internet Explorer is not supported. The web app is fully responsive and works on tablets, though we recommend our native iOS and Android apps for mobile devices.

### Does FlowBoard have keyboard shortcuts?

Yes! FlowBoard has extensive keyboard shortcuts to speed up your workflow. Press `?` anywhere in the app to see the full list. Common shortcuts include: `C` to create a new task, `K` to open command palette, `/` to search, `1-4` to switch between views, and `G then P` to go to projects. You can also navigate tasks with arrow keys and use `E` to quickly edit the selected task.

### How do I invite team members?

Go to Settings > Team and click "Invite Members". Enter email addresses (comma-separated for multiple) and select their role: Admin, Member, or Guest. Admins can manage billing and workspace settings. Members can create and edit projects. Guests have read-only access to specific projects you assign. Invited users receive an email invitation valid for 7 days. You can also generate a shareable invite link from the same page.

### Can I use FlowBoard offline?

The web app requires an internet connection, but our iOS and Android mobile apps support offline mode. You can view tasks, create new ones, and add comments while offline. Changes sync automatically when you reconnect. Offline edits are stored locally and merged intelligently - if someone else edited the same task, you'll see a conflict resolution screen when you come back online.

### What integrations does FlowBoard offer?

FlowBoard integrates with Slack, GitHub, GitLab, Google Drive, Figma, Jira (import), and Zapier. Slack integration sends notifications to channels when tasks are created, updated, or completed. GitHub/GitLab integration links pull requests to tasks automatically. Google Drive and Figma integrations let you attach files and designs directly. Zapier opens up 3,000+ additional integrations. See our Integrations guide for setup instructions.

### How do I contact support?

All users can reach us at support@flowboard.io - we respond within 24 hours. Pro users get live chat support (9 AM - 6 PM EST, Monday-Friday) via the ? icon in the bottom right. Enterprise customers get dedicated support with 2-hour response SLA and a dedicated Customer Success Manager. Our help center at help.flowboard.io has guides, videos, and troubleshooting articles.

### Is FlowBoard GDPR compliant?

Yes. FlowBoard is fully GDPR compliant. We are a registered data processor, and we provide Data Processing Agreements (DPA) to all customers. You can request data deletion, export user data, or exercise other GDPR rights from Settings > Privacy. We store EU customer data in AWS Frankfurt by default. See our Security & Compliance page for details on our SOC 2 Type II certification and encryption practices.
